sections.description: Native SEO control layer for the RankRocket remediation pipeline. Manages title/meta, schema injection, image ALT text, llms.txt, XML sitemap, robots.txt, cache purge, and self-updates.
sections.changelog:
• v3.1.0 — v3.0 Bite 3: rollback layer. GET /actions/{action_id} returns the stored envelope from rrseo_action_log; POST /actions/{action_id}/rollback replays the stored rollback payload with drift detection (409 action_state_drift when the target changed since execution; override with force:true), double-rollback protection (409 action_already_rolled_back), irreversible-action refusal (422 action_not_reversible), and dry_run:true simulation. Prior values recorded as absent are deleted, not written as empty strings. Rolled-back originals are marked in the log with rolled_back_at + rollback_action_id; each rollback stores its own envelope and fires both cache busts.
  • v3.0.0 — BREAKING: removed deprecated POST /snippets/replace-all (deprecated since v2.3.1; responses carried a v3.0.0 removal notice). Callers now get a standard rest_no_route 404. Migrate to POST /snippets/bulk (atomic batch create), POST /snippets/{id}, or DELETE /snippets/{id}. The rrseo_replace_all_snippets capability is revoked from the administrator role automatically on first load after upgrade.
  • v2.19.0 — v3.0 Bite 2: typed action engine. POST /actions/dry-run and POST /actions/execute (both manage_options) with a strict four-action whitelist: update_setting (nine typed WP core options incl. blog_public, show_on_front, page_on_front — issue #5), regenerate_llms_txt, update_meta_draft (writes _rr_seo_draft_* keys, never live meta), toggle_indexing (post-level rr_seo_robots). Every execute stores a rollback envelope in the capped rrseo_action_log option, writes a per-post audit row for post-targeted actions, and fires both cache busts (v2.17.x invariant). Dry-run never writes.
  • v2.18.1 — Fix schema + audit-log persistence (issue #3): _rrseo_schema_graph and _rrseo_change_log were registered in v2.14.4 with a string sanitize_callback that flattened every array write to an empty string, so POST /schema/{id} writes and all audit-log appends were silently discarded; the registrations are removed and array meta persists again. Fix duplicate canonical (issue #4): the singular canonical emitter (now rr_emit_singular_canonical()) unhooks WP core’s rel_canonical when it emits, so pages carry exactly one <link rel="canonical">; bail paths (noindex, disallowed post type, RankMath active) keep core’s canonical.
  • v2.18.0 — v3.0 Bite 1: five read-only observation endpoints for the external Audit Engine: GET /observe/heading-hierarchy/{post_id} (H1-H6 tree with structural warnings), GET /observe/broken-links (paginated link inventory; internal links resolved locally, external returned unchecked), GET /observe/alt-coverage (image ALT rollup by parent post type), GET /observe/schema-graph/{post_id} (stored JSON-LD graph), GET /observe/llms-diff (llms.txt vs canonical set drift). Also: discovery set now excludes posts whose canonical override points elsewhere (non_self_canonical); repaired literal \x escape bug in admin Loading placeholders; deactivation dialog strings localized; Text Domain header added.
  • v2.17.7 — Fix POST /meta/bulk-update ignoring top-level dry_run:true flag. Writes are now gated behind ! $dry_run; a dry-run call returns a per-post changes diff (matching /preview-update shape) with no DB writes, no cache bust, and no audit log entry.
  • v2.17.6 — rr_merge_wp_robots now emits explicit index, follow when no rr_seo_robots directive is stored and noindex is not already set. Migrates RRC_SEO_EXPLICIT_ROBOTS from mu-plugin, fully retiring the SEO patch layer.
  • v2.17.5 — Hide “View Details” link from Plugins screen (plugin_row_meta filter strips plugin-install.php links from the plugin row).
  • v2.17.4 — Removed duplicate GET /canonical-urls/preview route (stale AEO/GEO stub; G-18 alias over rmb_sitemap_preview remains authoritative).
  • v2.17.3 — rrseo_purge_rest_cache() fires litespeed_purge_url after every write (fixes /status counter lag and /snippets staleness on LiteSpeed); G-10 slug collision in individual POST /snippets fixed with while-loop increment.
  • v2.17.2 — rrseo_bust_option_cache() added after all update_option() calls (fixes staleness on LiteSpeed/Redis sites); G-10 slug collision now uses _1/_2/_3 increment.
  • v2.17.1 — wp_cache_flush() added to POST /cache/purge; removed_count fixed in replace-all; is_admin added to RR_PERF_ALLOWED_CONDITIONALS.
  • v2.17.0 — G-07 POST /elementor/repair-cache (clears Elementor element + CSS cache, single or batch); G-14 display_on_user field on all snippet write endpoints (all|anonymous|logged_in).
  • v2.16.1 — G-19 description fallback in page head (excerpt then first paragraph; rrseo_excerpt_fallback_length filter, default 155); G-06 migrate-legacy skips fields containing %token% patterns.
  • v2.16.0 — G-04 POST /perf/dequeue-rules (conditional asset dequeue via wp_enqueue_scripts:999); G-05 POST /perf/defer-handles (script defer injection).
  • v2.15.0 — G-10 POST /snippets/bulk (atomic batch create, per-item validation); G-09/G-17 GET+POST /sitemap/exclusions; expanded test placeholder patterns.
  • v2.14.4 — G-16 register_post_meta for all rr_seo_* keys; G-18 GET /canonical-urls/preview alias; G-13 rrseo_snippet_emitted and rrseo_snippet_skipped action hooks.
  • v2.14.3 — FU-1b line_count off-by-one fixed; FU-4 REST fatal handler (returns clean JSON 500 instead of leaking HTML); FU-3/FU-5 README created.
  • v2.14.2 — FU-2 unset_fields on POST /update: delete stored meta by field name. Returns 422 for unknown fields or write/unset conflicts.
  • v2.14.1 — Fix G-12 fatal: rmb_llms_regenerate() now unpacks $result['content'] before passing to substr_count()/strlen().
  • v2.14.0 — Lift G-01 gate; restore post_id: alias; G-02 422 on term IDs in /preview-update; G-03 consolidate_canonical in /status; G-11 GET /snippets/{slug}; G-12 POST /llms-txt/regenerate.
  • v2.13.1 — Gate unimplemented display_on patterns (term:/tax:/url: return 422); fix leading space in <title> and double spaces in <meta name="description"> when RankMath is inactive.
  • v2.13.0 — Taxonomy archive SEO (G-01, G-02, G-08). display_on accepts term:taxonomy:slug, term_id:int, tax:taxonomy, and url:/path. /update and /get/{id} read/write rr_seo_* term meta.
  • v2.12.2 — P6 snippet renderer: adds sitewide, singular, post_type:slug display_on values; body_open location surface; rrseo_emit_snippets killswitch option.
  • v2.12.1 — Default batch cap raised from 20 to 100; rrseo_batch_max filter exposed for per-site tuning.
  • v2.12.0 — White-label via wp-config.php constants: RRSEO_WL_NAME, RRSEO_WL_DESCRIPTION, RRSEO_WL_AUTHOR, RRSEO_WL_AUTHOR_URL, RRSEO_WL_SUPPORT_URL, RRSEO_WL_HIDE_PLUGIN.
  • v2.11.6 — Accept code as alias for content in all snippet write handlers.
  • v2.11.5 — Fix exclusion pattern case normalization in rr_is_utility_url().
  • v2.11.4 — Fix sitemap index lastmod consistency: derives lastmod via rr_get_canonical_url_set() instead of raw get_posts().
  • v2.11.3 — Canonical URL emission to <head>; Twitter Card meta; robots.txt auto-sync (rrseo_robots_txt_auto_sync); wp_robots() consolidation (rrseo_consolidate_wp_robots).
  • v2.11.2 — Fix robots.txt stale state: bust WP object cache after POST /robots-txt; add clearstatcache() calls.
  • v2.11.1 — Fix snippet renderer ignoring display_on:all; add home/homepage aliases for front_page.
  • v2.11.0 — robots.txt written as a physical file on every save; activation hook syncs DB content to file; deactivation confirmation dialog added.
  • v2.10.1 — Fix check-updates handler for private plugins; rename button to “Check for Updates”.
  • v2.10.0 — AEO/GEO audit data layer: five new REST endpoints (/canonical-urls/preview, /aeo-geo/readiness, /aeo-geo/entity, /aeo-geo/schema-audit, /aeo-geo/source-sync).
  • v2.9.3 — Fix schema JSON-LD visible as plain text (wp_kses_post was stripping script tags); fix PUC vendor path mismatch that silently disabled update notifications.
  • v2.9.2 — Legacy rankmath-bridge/v1 namespace alias via rest_pre_dispatch; register_post_meta for _rrseo_llms_section; fix first-paragraph description fallback.
  • v2.9.1 — Force Update Check button + POST /check-updates; admin llms.txt config tab rebuilt.
  • v2.9.0 — Section classifier, GET /llms/preview, _rrseo_llms_section meta.
